curation_notes: The advisory references XWIKI-5027. The core security fix is commit c1fb144 on master, which adds AuthorExecutor-based rights checking to the content inclusion execution path so that included content runs with the content author's privileges rather than the includer's. The pre-patch commit a3815f2 is its direct parent. Only one non-test source file (IncludeMacro.java) was changed. Checked 12 sibling rendering macro modules (cache, code, container, context, gallery, groovy, python, rss, script, toc, useravatar, velocity) — none share the same content-inclusion-with-author-rights pattern. L3 hints updated to be more specific than L1/L2 per updated curation guidelines. Vulnerability class auth-bypass confirmed from CWE-863 and the patch which adds proper author context enforcement.
